economic_notes: Nation owns Saik'uz Development Corporation, Tagi Resources LP, Tagi Contracting LP, Tagi Forestry LP, Tin Toh Forest Products LLP and related entities. Contingent liability for Tin Toh Forest Products LLP line of credit ($240,000) and lease facility ($100,000). Nation owns a contaminated building with undetermined remediation cost.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Comparative 2021 figures were restated to correct ISC deferred revenue recognition error of $472,304. 11 government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Ottawa Trust Fund ($978,756) held in consolidated revenue fund of Government of Canada. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $8,396,109 + CMHC $2,258,266 + Province of BC $197,224 + CSFS $1,142,925 + CSTC $2,866,452 (treated as government/tribal transfers) + PGNAETA $528,107 + Ottawa Trust $20,877 = note - CSFS and CSTC are tribal council transfers not direct government; if excluded, total government transfers = ISC $8,396,109 + CMHC $2,258,266 + Province of BC $197,224 + PGNAETA $528,107 + Ottawa Trust $20,877 = $11,400,583. Value used reflects ISC + CMHC + Province + PGNAETA + Ottawa Trust + CSFS + CSTC = $15,410,083 but CSTC/CSFS included as government-sourced funding per statement. OSR = Other income $4,365,467.
